risks.title: Acid degradation of balloon envelope
risks.mitigation: Multi-layer fluoropolymer; altitude selection; ground acid exposure tests

risks.title: Entry / inflation sequence failure
risks.mitigation: Redundant inflation path; extensive drop / vacuum tests; VEGA lessons

risks.title: Comms blackout / insufficient downlink
risks.mitigation: 3U CubeSat relay architecture; store-and-forward; power budget margin

risks.title: Launch rideshare slip past 2027 window
risks.mitigation: Multiple vehicle options; mass keeps rideshare-compatible; early LOI talks

risks.title: Crowdfund / partner capital shortfall
risks.mitigation: Stripe tiers live; sponsor outreach; in-kind hardware path

risks.title: Planetary protection / DNA tier regulatory delay
risks.mitigation: Early counsel; inert sealed capsule design; tier policy review

risks.title: Sensor mass growth eats float margin
risks.mitigation: Hard mass caps in mass-budget.json; descope ladder documented
